chapters.title: New Membership
chapters.content: Kevin joined a gym for the first time. He wanted to feel healthier and create a better routine for his mornings.

chapters.title: First Workout
chapters.content: Everything felt new: the machines, the weights, and even the music. Kevin followed a trainer’s advice and started slowly.

chapters.title: Small Progress
chapters.content: After two weeks, Kevin already felt more energetic. The hardest part was starting, but now he enjoyed going every day.
